executive_summary:
{
  "executive_summary": "Capelle aan den IJssel's 2023 municipal budget totals EUR 880.9M in both expenditure and income, presented as fully balanced. The two largest domains—Finance & Treasury (EUR 303.1M) and Governance & Administration (EUR 286.8M)—together absorb 67% of the budget, while the Social Domain adds another EUR 136.9M, underscoring the dominance of transfer payments, social care, and internal financial flows. Own-source
